keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY NIPPLES. Nipples : Arn., Cham., Grap., Lyc., Pul., Sul. Nipples, bleeding : Sep., Sil., Sul. Nipples, cracked : Caust., Grap., Phyt., Sul. Nipples, excoriated : Arn., Flu-ac., Phyt., Sul. Nipples, outward , going pains : Berb., Bry., Gels., Lapp., Lyc., Mez., Ol-an., Spig.
